Start Saving Today With A Hedges Direct Trade Account Online

Getting everything you need for your next project with Hedges Direct couldn’t be easier. Our trade portal gives you instant access to exclusive pricing, the option to request products not listed online, and the flexibility to complete quotes straight from your account. Whether you’re on site with your mobile or planning from the sofa, we’ve made it simple, quick, and hassle-free.

Exclusive Trade Pricing

Save up to 70% off retail pricing

Rebate Scheme

Get up to 10% back as account credit

Personal Account Manager

To help you along the way

Save up to 70% off retail pricing

Apply for your FREE trade account today and save on your next project!

Getting set up couldn’t be easier. Complete our simple application form and we will have you up and planting in no time. Already got a trade account? Simply log in and see your savings.

Personal
Account Manager

We are here to help you through any queries and questions with a dedicated account manager just for you.

Plus, all these extra benefits

  • The widest availability and selection of hedges and shrubs
  • Complete plant project sourcing, not just hedging
  • Dedicated trade team with years of knowledge
  • Checkout in your time, wherever, whenever
  • Save your quotes until your clients are ready to proceed
  • Trade specific products only on the trade portal
  • Delivery on a day that is convenient for you and your client
  • A 12 month green guarantee, giving you and your client peace of mind

So. What are you waiting for? 

All that is between you and these exclusive benefits is this simple form. Drop your details in, we will review them and will have you up and planting in no time. 

About you

Address

We aren't just online. Our in-house dedicated Trade Team offer our trade customers a comprehensive, friendly and efficient service for all your planting requirements. With horticultural resources to source ALL types of plants, not just hedging, you can use Hedges Direct for complete job pricing and plant supply.

The Hedges Direct trade team are here to help with all your planting requirements, whether we stock it or not! We work with growers and suppliers all over the UK and Europe, so we can be your complete one- stop-shop for plants, saving you both time and money. Our experienced team can provide expert advice and a friendly, efficient and flexible service tailored to work for you.

Contact the team today and we'll ensure that you're set up with the best account type that will benefit you the most.

Call us now on: 01257 367734

Want to see more? Come and visit our nursery

We're more than happy to give you a guided tour around our operation. Come and see
our vast selection of plants and hedging that we offer.

Book Visit

Want to grow your network?

Join our planting network, where we will send you jobs from our customers. We take the risk, you get the rewards. If that isn't for you, did you know you can list your business on our Hedging Network? Drop us a note on either of the pages below and our trade team will get back to you as soon as possible. 

Become a landscape partner

Cookie Preference Center

  • Your Privacy

  • Strictly Necessary Cookies

  • Performance Cookies

  • Functional Cookies

  • Targeting Cookies

  • Social Media Cookies

Your Privacy

We'd like to set additional cookies so we can remember your settings, understand how you use our website and to make improvements. If you'd like to deny any of these additional cookies then please disable them below.

Strictly Necessary Cookies

Always Active

These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.

Performance Cookies

These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.

Functional Cookies

These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.

Targeting Cookies

These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.

Social Media Cookies

These cookies are set by a range of social media services that we have added to the site to enable you to share our content with your friends and networks. They are capable of tracking your browser across other sites and building up a profile of your interests. This may impact the content and messages you see on other websites you visit. If you do not allow these cookies you may not be able to use or see these sharing tools.

Cookie List
